name: Chunky Gazpacho
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Thawed frozen or fresh corn kernels
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients.
2. Cover and refrigerate for 3 to 4 hours before serving.
3. For an alternative preparation, puree half of the ingredients in a food processor or blender and leave the remaining ingredients finely chopped.
